title: chrysanthemum vestitum
intro: Chrysanthemum vestitum, also known as the 'Yin Yang Huo', is a type of flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum vestitum include reducing fever, relieving headache and cough, and improving cardiovascular health. It is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
